hero.headline: 22 Years of Pools Done Right, On Time
hero.subheadline: Founded by a scientist who brought lab-grade precision to pool chemistry, On-Time Pool Service has kept Sarasota pools crystal clear since 2004. Sit back while our uniformed technicians handle every detail — you just dive in.
hero.badge_2: FSPA Service Pro of the Year
checkmarks: Service reports with photos after every visit

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Scientist-Precise Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Sarasota Homeowners
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full renovations, our licensed team brings 22 years of expertise to every pool we touch. No guesswork, no shortcuts — just results you can see and water you can trust.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Chemical balancing, surface skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks — delivered on schedule every week with a photo report emailed to you after each visit.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Variable-speed pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and timers — diagnosed fast and repaired right the first time by our licensed technicians.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp? Our specialized restoration process brings even the worst algae-filled pools back to crystal-clear condition quickly.

cards.title: Pool Automation Systems
cards.description: Control your pump, heater, lighting, and energy usage from your smartphone. We install and configure complete automation systems for effortless pool management.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Resurfacing, custom tile work, paver installation, and full modernization of outdated pools. Transform your backyard into the oasis you deserve.

cards.title: Saltwater Conversions
cards.description: Upgrade to a gentler, lower-maintenance saltwater system. We handle the full conversion including chlorinator installation, plumbing, and chemistry calibration.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will schedule a thorough inspection at no charge. We assess your equipment, water chemistry, and surface condition — then give you an honest recommendation.

steps.title: We Show Up — On Time, Every Time
steps.description: Our uniformed, background-checked technicians arrive when scheduled. After every visit, you receive an automated email report complete with photos documenting exactly what was done.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays pristine, properly balanced, and swim-ready year-round. If anything is ever less than perfect, we come back and make it right at no additional cost.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts Us
about.headline: Founded by a Scientist. Driven by Precision.
about.description: When Kirk Bradley left a 20-year career in food science to start On-Time Pool Service in 2004, he brought something rare to the industry: analytical precision and a relentless commitment to quality. Today, our team carries that same standard into every backyard we service. We wear uniforms, drive clean trucks, and document every visit with photos — because professionalism is not optional, it is who we are. Three-time Herald Tribune Readers' Choice winner and FSPA Service Professional of the Year.

features.title: Uniformed, Professional Technicians
features.description: Every team member arrives in uniform with a clean, organized truck. You will always know who is servicing your pool.

features.title: Photo Reports After Every Visit
features.description: Automated email reports with photos document exactly what was done at each service visit. Complete transparency, zero guesswork.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: Not happy with a visit? We come back and redo it at no charge. Our 4.9-star rating across 532+ reviews speaks for itself.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — we earn your trust every visit.

guarantee.headline: Our "On-Time, Every Time" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. We have maintained a 4.9-star rating for over two decades because we never cut corners and we never leave until the job is done right.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority response. Call us at 941-224-0404 and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate or lanai access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you receive an automated email report with photos so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: What sets On-Time Pool Service apart from other companies?
faqs.answer: Our founder brought 20 years of scientific expertise to pool chemistry. We send photo reports after every visit, our technicians wear uniforms and drive clean trucks, and we have been voted Sarasota's best pool service three years running. Our 4.9-star rating with 532+ reviews reflects the standard we hold ourselves to.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. We hold a Florida Pool Contractor license (CPC#1459543), LP Gas Installer license, and carry full liability insurance. Every technician is background-checked and trained to our exacting standards.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in my area?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Longboat Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, Palmer Ranch, Venice, Bradenton, and surrounding communities. Call us to confirm service availability at your address.

testimonials.name: Cheryl S.
testimonials.text: Ontime pool is just what it says — always on time and excellent work. They have been incredibly reliable and my pool has never looked better.

testimonials.name: Vincent L.
testimonials.text: Very satisfied with your service; my pool looks fabulous. The team is professional, thorough, and I love getting the photo reports after each visit.

testimonials.name: Peter & Gary R.
testimonials.text: Excellent service, reliable and efficient. We have had a successful relationship with On-Time Pool Service for years. They truly care about doing things right.
